channel.title: jOOQ on YoSQL - write more SQL
channel.description: Recent content in jOOQ on YoSQL - write more SQL

item.title: jOOQ
item.description: The jOOQ based implementation. It uses the DSLContext class to execute SQL statements and map results to your domain objects. Read Write Call Batch Write Rxjava Stream Eager Stream Lazy ✘ ✘ ✘ ✘ ✘ ✘ ✘
